security.title: Maximum Security & Compliance
security.description: Your data and your customers' data are protected by the highest security standards. GDPR compliance guaranteed for your peace of mind.

ssl.title: SSL/TLS Encryption
ssl.description: All data is encrypted in transit and at rest with the latest SSL/TLS standards

mfa.title: Multi-Factor Authentication
mfa.description: Enhanced protection with two-factor authentication for all admin access

hosting.title: Secure Hosting
hosting.description: ISO 27001 certified servers with 24/7 monitoring and automatic backups

gdpr.title: GDPR Compliance
gdpr.description: Full GDPR compliance with consent management and right to be forgotten

monitoring.title: Real-Time Monitoring
monitoring.description: Continuous access monitoring and automated intrusion detection

access.title: Access Control
access.description: Fine-grained permission management with principle of least privilege
